name: Ruth Warrick's Whiskey Ice Box Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in cold water.
2. Dissolve gelatin with boiling water.
3. Beat egg yolks until thick and add whiskey slowly.
4. Add sugar, lemon juice to the yolk mixture.
5. Stir in dissolved gelatin and chill for a short time.
6. Whip cream and fold into the mixture.
7. Beat egg whites and fold in.
8. Line the sides and bottom of a 12-inch spring form pan with split lady fingers.
9. Pour the batter into the pan slowly.
10. Add a layer of lady fingers when about halfway filled.
11. Place a design of lady fingers on top.
12. Chill overnight in the refrigerator.
13. Unmold before serving.
